response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable polyglot engineer with strong fundamentals and broad experience across web, backend, and embedded systems, but the resume shows no evidence of the core domain expertise this role requires: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical and causal analysis. His most relevant technical signal — high-throughput micro-services at Dunnhumby — demonstrates distributed systems capability but not at the architectural scope or strategic scale expected of a Principal IC6. Recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is a mild positive, but it does not offset the absence of growth engineering or experimentation system ownership anywhere in the 17-year career.
strengths: Broad polyglot proficiency across TypeScript, C, C++, Java, and DLang, covering most of the required language set
Hands-on experience building high-throughput distributed micro-services processing millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby
Recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq signal adaptability to modern developer-tools and agentic workflows
concerns: Zero experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience anywhere in the resume
No telemetry pipeline, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/causal analysis work evident; core data-aptitude requirements are unmet
Career titles and scope remain at Senior/Staff level with no demonstrated cross-org technical leadership or IC6-caliber system ownership

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics platform background
